name: Baked Fresh Salmon
recipeIngredient: 2 Cucumbers, peeled and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine salt, pepper, and thyme. Rub the mixture onto all sides of the salmon.
2. Melt butter in a baking dish. Place the salmon in the dish and coat it with the melted butter.
3. Add cream, onion slices, parsley sprigs, garlic clove, and bay leaf to the baking dish. Arrange cucumber strips around the fish.
4. Cover the baking dish and bake for 40 minutes, or until the center of the salmon is easily removable by a fork.
5. Remove and discard the bay leaf, onions, parsley sprigs, and garlic before serving.
